topbar.title: Compliance Workspace
topbar.searchPlaceholder: Search controls, evidence, tasks, and audit activity...

sidebar.mvpDescription: Manage controls, evidence, tasks, and audit history in one traceable compliance workflow.

audit.heroTitle: Monitor every compliance action in your organization.
audit.heroDescription: Search, filter, and sort through recent audit events to track who did what and when.
audit.searchPlaceholder: Search by summary or actor email...

state.emptyDescription: Audit events will appear here as you take compliance actions.

dashboard.description: Monitor controls, evidence readiness, open tasks, and recent audit activity for your active organization.
dashboard.dueSoonDescription: Controls due in the next 14 days
dashboard.noOpenTasks: No open tasks found for this workspace.

evidencePage.heroTitle: Collect and review evidence for audit readiness.
evidencePage.heroDescription: Search, filter, sort, create, upload, and archive evidence documents for your active organization.
evidencePage.emptyDescription: Add URL evidence, upload file evidence, or adjust filters/search to find existing evidence.

tasksPage.heroTitle: Track action items across compliance work.
tasksPage.heroDescription: Create, assign, filter, and complete tasks linked to controls and evidence readiness.
tasksPage.emptyDescriptionManager: Create a task to start tracking compliance action items.

workspacesPage.heroDescription: Switch between organizations to manage compliance across different workspaces.
workspacesPage.emptyDescription: You are not a member of any organization yet. Create an account or ask an admin for an invitation.

complianceCreate.title: Create compliance item
complianceCreate.description: Select a framework and requirement to create a new compliance control.

compliancePage.heroTitle: Manage your control readiness from one workspace.
compliancePage.heroDescription: Review baseline requirements, update statuses, capture notes, and prepare each control for evidence review.
compliancePage.emptyDescription: Seed the security baseline to create demo compliance controls for this workspace.
compliancePage.askAdmin: Ask an admin to apply a framework

complianceDetail.notFoundDescription: This compliance item does not exist or you do not have access.
complianceDetail.noNotes: No notes recorded for this control.
complianceDetail.noLinkedEvidence: No evidence linked to this control yet.

taskDialog.title: Create compliance task
taskDialog.description: Add a new action item to track compliance work.

evidenceCard.archiveConfirm: Archive evidence "{title}"? This will remove it from the active evidence list.

evidenceFileDialog.title: Upload file evidence
evidenceFileDialog.description: Upload a file through a secure presigned URL, then create evidence metadata in CompliPilot.
evidenceFileDialog.fileHelp: PDF, image, document, or report. Max 10MB.

errors.fileTooLarge: File size must be 10MB or smaller.
errors.chooseFile: Please choose a file to upload.

evidenceUrlDialog.title: Add URL evidence
evidenceUrlDialog.description: Create evidence metadata for an external URL.

evidenceEditDialog.title: Edit evidence
evidenceEditDialog.description: Update metadata for this evidence document.

seedDemo.success: Demo framework applied. Created {createdCount} controls, skipped {skippedCount}.

complianceItemCard.notesPlaceholder: Add compliance notes, evidence context, or review decisions...

frameworksPanel.title: Compliance frameworks
frameworksPanel.empty: No frameworks yet. Seed the security baseline or create a custom framework.

authShell.title: Turn compliance work into a clear operating system.
authShell.description: Manage controls, evidence, owners, deadlines, and audit history in one workspace designed for trust, traceability, and speed.

features.evidence: Evidence-first workflows with upload and linking
features.tasks: Task ownership, filters, search, sorting, and audit trail
features.support: Request ID tracing for production-grade support

register.title: Create account
register.description: Start a workspace with OWNER access.

hero.title: Run compliance operations with evidence-first traceability.
hero.description: CompliPilot helps teams manage controls, evidence, tasks, frameworks, AI reviews, and audit history in one workspace built for audit readiness.

preview.title: What CompliPilot covers
preview.ctaDescription: Create a workspace, apply a baseline framework, link evidence to controls, and use AI to identify gaps before audit review.

controls.title: Control Readiness
controls.description: Track requirements, update control status, capture notes, and monitor due dates across the compliance lifecycle.

evidence.title: Evidence Operations
evidence.description: Upload files through presigned URLs, add URL evidence, link evidence to controls, and keep audit-ready traceability.

tasks.title: Compliance Task Management
tasks.description: Create, assign, prioritize, search, sort, and resolve action items related to controls and evidence gaps.

audit.title: Audit Trail
audit.description: Capture key compliance actions so teams can review who changed what, when, and in which workspace.

frameworks.title: Framework Library
frameworks.description: Apply a security baseline or create custom frameworks with structured requirements and categories.

workflow.title: From framework requirements to audit-ready evidence.
workflow.description: CompliPilot connects controls, evidence, tasks, AI review, and audit history into one traceable workflow.

framework.title: Apply a framework
framework.description: Start from a security baseline or create custom compliance requirements.

control.title: Review controls
control.description: Update status, notes, due dates, and readiness for each requirement.

evidence.title: Attach evidence
evidence.description: Upload files or link external URLs, then connect evidence to the right control.

audit.title: Review audit history
audit.description: Keep critical compliance actions searchable and traceable for audit preparation.

modules.title: A practical compliance workspace for control and evidence review.
modules.description: CompliPilot is organized around clear modules so compliance workflows, backend services, and AI-assisted reviews can evolve cleanly.

items.auth: Secure authentication with protected organization workspaces
items.dashboard: Readiness dashboard with control, task, and evidence metrics
items.evidence: Evidence library with upload, download, archive, linking, AI analysis, and history
items.tasks: Task tracking with filters, priorities, ownership, and status flow
items.audit: Audit trail with search, filters, sorting, and request tracing
items.i18n: English and Vietnamese interface for practical demo and review

finalCta.title: Keep compliance evidence reviewable, traceable, and audit-ready.
finalCta.description: Start with a workspace, apply baseline controls, upload evidence, use AI to detect gaps, and keep every important action recorded.

onboarding.title: Set up your compliance workspace.
onboarding.description: CompliPilot helps you manage controls, evidence, tasks, AI review, and audit history in one traceable workspace.

framework.title: 1. Apply a framework
framework.description: Start with the security baseline or create a custom framework for your organization.

controls.title: 2. Review controls
controls.description: Update status, notes, due dates, and readiness for every compliance requirement.

evidence.title: 3. Attach evidence
evidence.description: Upload files through presigned URLs or add external URL evidence, then link it to the right control.

audit.title: 4. Track audit history
audit.description: Key compliance actions are recorded so teams can review who did what and when.

onboarding.success: Demo framework applied. Created {createdCount} controls, skipped {skippedCount}.
onboarding.tip: Recommended first run: seed a demo workspace, review Compliance, upload Evidence, then try AI analysis.

welcome.title: Welcome to your compliance workspace.
welcome.description: CompliPilot brings controls, evidence, tasks, AI review, and audit history into one workspace.
welcome.highlight: Recommended path: seed demo data, review controls, upload evidence, then run AI evidence analysis.

framework.title: Start with a framework.
framework.description: Apply a security baseline or create a custom framework to generate structured compliance controls.
framework.highlight: Frameworks define what needs to be reviewed, evidenced, and tracked.

controls.title: Review and update controls.
controls.description: Track status, notes, due dates, and readiness for every compliance requirement.
controls.highlight: Controlled status transitions help keep reviews consistent.

evidence.title: Attach evidence to controls.
evidence.description: Upload files or add URL evidence, then link each item to the relevant control.
evidence.highlight: Evidence-first traceability makes audit review easier to explain.

audit.title: Keep actions traceable.
audit.description: Important changes are recorded in the audit trail with searchable history.
audit.highlight: Audit history helps teams understand who did what, when, and why.

members.title: Organization members
members.description: Manage workspace users, roles, and access status.

dialog.title: Add organization member
dialog.description: Create or add a user to this organization with a selected role.

seed.success: Created {createdUsers} users, created {createdMemberships} memberships, updated {updatedMemberships} memberships.

evidenceHistory.title: AI evidence review history
evidenceHistory.description: Saved AI review results for this evidence item.

complianceSuggestion.title: AI evidence recommendation
complianceSuggestion.subtitle: Evidence coverage, missing proof, and next actions for this control.
